raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "ridsan zaar fatweem Elka-Dee-
weem darrijs grehkoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ta faika tas
KUNGS Israēka Deeivs: Redz-
es weddichu faunu pahr Je-
rusalemi un pahr Juhdu/ ka ik-
karam/ kas to dsird abbi diwi
Ausis skannchs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es wilkschu pahr Je-
rusalemi Samartjas Mehra-
Ankli/ un Akaba Naīna Swar-
ru/ un iṣkrattischu Jerusaleini/
ka Vtohdu iṣkratta/ kas iṣkratti-
ta tohp/ un us Mutti apgahsta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es afstahschu tohs At-
likkutchus mannas Eemantoscha-
nas/ un nodohschu tohs winnu
Eenaidneeku Rohkā/ un tee buhs
par Laupijumu un Jspohstifcha-
nu wisfeem winnu Eenaidnee-
keem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka tee darrijscht/
kas man ne patihk/ un mann ap-
kaitinajscht/ no tahs Deenas/
rad winnu Tehwi no Egiptes is-
gahje/ lihds thodeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl istehje Manassus
arridsan nenosecdsigu Affini toh-
ti dauds/ teekains Jerusaleme ne
weena Galla lihds ehtram villa
tappe: Bes teem Grehkeem/ ar
fo wiꞥsch Juhdu grehkoht darri-
ja/ darroht/ kas tam KUNGam
ne patikfe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Manassus
Leetahm atleek un wifs/ fo wiꞥsch
irr darrijs/ un winna Grehki/ fo
wiꞥsch irr grehkojis/ tas wifs irr
rakstihts to Kehnizu no Juhda
Laiku-Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Manassus afemitge
ar jaweem Tehweem/ un tappe
tawa Namina Dahrsā/ Usaius
Dahrsā aprakts/ un winna
Dehls Amons tappe par Kehni-
xu winna Weetā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Amions bija diwidesmits
un diwi Gaddus wezz/ kad tas
par Kehnixu tappe/ un waldia
diwi Gaddus Jerusaleme/ un
winna Mahtei bija Mesulemete
Wahrda/ Aruza Meita no
Jotbas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch darrija/ kas
tam KUNGAM ne patikfe/ it-
tin ka winna Tehws Manassus
bij darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch staigaja eekich
wisfeem Zelkeem/ eekich ka win-
na Tehws bij staigajs/ un kalpo-
ja teem Elka-Deewem/ kam
winna Tehws bij kalpojis/ un
klannijahs preekich teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta afstahje wiꞥsch to
KUNGU fatwo Tehwo Deewu/
un ne staigaja eekich ta KUNga
Zelkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Amoza Kalpi darrija
weenu Derribu prett winnu/
un nokawe to Kehnixu winna
Naimmā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tahs Semmes Lau-
dis kawe tohs wikus/ kas prett
to Kehnixu Amonu weenu Derr-
bu bij darrijscht. Un tahs Sem-
mes Laudis darrija winna Deh-
u Josiju par Kehnixu winna
Weetā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Amoza
Leetahm atleek/ fo wiꞥsch irr dar-
rijs/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
